description: Style Note Crafted with traditional printing and dyeing techniques, each piece from fabindia is created by artisans from villages nestled in the green valleys of India. The brand consciously searches out ancient fabric weaving and dyeing techniques that are dying out and infuses them with new life by providing these craftsmen a viable market. This kurta is a unique piece fashioned to please not only those who love the simple life but also the style-conscious global citizen. It will look great when styled with leggings. Product Details Green Magyar hand printed kurta, has a round neckline, short sleeves and side slits Material and Care Cotton Hand wash separately using a mild detergent in cold water Dry in shade Do not soak This unique fabric has been dyed/ hand printed using traditional dyeing processes. Some colours may initially transfer when in dry or wet contact with light coloured fabrics or upholstery. This transfer will reduce after a few washes but we recommend that you wash the product separately for the first few washes. Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
